action.reasoning: Observation: 6-way ensemble dropped slightly to 0.4744 vs 5-way best 0.4747. Adding wise_alpha0.70 and model_v3_last didn't help. 3 iters, 5.6h left. Analysis: 5-way ensemble (model.pt + wise_alpha0.90 + model_v2 + model_v3 + wise_alpha0.80) is current best. Try TTA (horizontal flip) on the 5-way ensemble — cheap and often helps. If it improves, submit. Otherwise resubmit best. Decision: Add horizontal flip TTA to predict_ensemble.py and submit eval with 5-way ensemble + TTA.
